param.name: alternate
param.value: (ec:label('damage'), ' ', ec:label('through', false()), ' ', ec:translate(@agent, false(), false()), ' (', gap/@quantity, ' ', ec:translate(gap/@unit, gap/@quantity > 1, false()), ')')

param.name: alternate
param.value: (ec:label('damage'), ' ', ec:label('through', false()), ' ', ec:translate(@agent, false(), false()), ', ', ec:label('unclear-rdg', false()))

param.name: alternate
param.value: (ec:label('damage'), ' ', ec:label('through', false()), ' ', ec:translate(@agent, false(), false()), ', ', ec:label('supplied-after', false()), ' ', supplied/@source)

param.name: alternate
param.value: (ec:label('damage'), ' ', ec:label('through', false()), ' ', ec:translate(@agent, false(), false()), ', ', ec:label('supplied', false()))

param.name: alternate
param.value: (ec:label('damage'), ' ', ec:label('through', false()), ' ', ec:translate(@agent, false(), false()), ', ', ec:span((ec:label('add'), ' ', string-join((ec:translate(add/@place, false(), false()), ec:translate(add/@hand, false(), false()), ec:translate(add/@rend, false(), false()), ec:translate(add/@type, false(), false())), ' '))))
